entry.title: New: RES25-270 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRANSPORTATION, LODGING AND TRAVEL EXPENSES TO THE CITY FROM THE BLOOMBERG HARVARD CITY LEADERSHIP INITIATIVE IN COLLABORATION WITH PARTNERS FOR PUBLIC GOOD FOR FOUR STAFF MEMBERS FROM THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU TO ATTEND THE LEADING CITY PROCUREMENT REFORM IN-PERSON PROGRAM IN CAMBRIDGE, MASSACHUSETTS FROM OCTOBER 25-30, 2025.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
